features.name: Health Check Endpoints
features.description: Health check endpoints for monitoring system status, database connectivity, and service availability.

features.name: Public Web Ordering API
features.description: Public API endpoints for customers to place orders via web interface. Includes menu retrieval, order creation, and order status.

features.name: Order State Machine
features.description: Order lifecycle management with states: OPEN, LOCKED, CLOSED. Enforces immutability and prevents invalid state transitions.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Magic link authentication system for restaurant staff. Includes request, verify, and session management.

features.name: Event Store API
features.description: Event sourcing endpoints for appending events, querying event history, and rebuilding state from events.

features.name: Payment Webhooks
features.description: Stripe webhook handlers for payment confirmation, failure, and subscription management.

features.name: Subscription Management
features.description: API endpoints for managing Stripe subscriptions, upgrades, downgrades, and addon management.

features.name: Onboarding Wizard API
features.description: Internal API for restaurant onboarding wizard including identity, menu, payments, and design configuration.

features.name: Web-to-POS Bridge
features.description: Bridge service that converts web orders to POS events and manages session synchronization.

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Audit trail system for tracking all system actions and changes with immutable event logs.

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: Client-side rate limiting middleware to prevent spam and abuse of API endpoints.

features.name: Circuit Breaker
features.description: Circuit breaker pattern for external service calls to prevent cascading failures.

features.name: Database Connection Pool
features.description: PostgreSQL connection pool with timeout configuration and health monitoring.

features.name: Public Profile API
features.description: Public restaurant profile endpoints for retrieving restaurant information and settings.

features.name: Local Boss API
features.description: AI-powered local business insights, review analysis, and operational recommendations.

features.name: Govern API
features.description: Governance endpoints for system insights, actions, and decision tracking.

features.name: Reservations API
features.description: Restaurant reservation management endpoints including waitlist and booking management.

features.name: Reputation Hub API
features.description: Review and reputation management endpoints for multi-location restaurants.

features.name: Operational Hub API
features.description: Fast mode and operational dashboard endpoints for real-time restaurant operations.

features.name: Web Page Previews
features.description: Server-side rendering for public restaurant web pages and menu previews.
